extraction_reasoning: No litigation summary table is provided: the text explicitly states no criminal charges under IPC and securities law against the promoters, directors and Company, while civil and tax matters are mentioned without counts or quantified amounts; no 'By' proceedings are disclosed, so criminal, regulatory and tax counts and the aggregate litigation amount are null. Contingent liabilities are disclosed on a standalone basis as of June 30, 2007 in Rs. lacs, with line items of Rs. 2.25 lacs and Rs. 2,200.00 lacs; because no stated Total row is provided, these are summed to Rs. 2,202.25 lacs, or Rs. 22.0225 crore. The only customer concentration disclosed is company-wide top 10 dealers contributing about 45% of sales during FY 2006-07; the text does not expressly identify sales as revenue from operations or total income, but it is a full-year company-wide figure. The source monetary unit is lacs/lakh, converted to crore by dividing by 100.
